root.speaker: Almanac-Keeper Olber
root.text:
Welcome to the almanac. Every planting, every harvest,
every queer year — it's all on this shelf.

choices.label: How far back does it go?

last.speaker: Almanac-Keeper Olber
last.text:
Last entry says: 'a stranger asked the cows.' I didn't
write that. I don't know who did.

cows.speaker: Almanac-Keeper Olber
cows.text: Cows don't speak to me. Perhaps they spoke to the stranger.

back.speaker: Almanac-Keeper Olber
back.text:
Four generations. The earliest pages are in my
great-grandmother's hand. She used a different
calendar; we still don't quite agree which days were
Tuesday.

props.message:
Almanac —

when to plant, when to harvest.
Last entry: 'a stranger asked the cows.'

A row of clothbound books, each labelled with a year.
The newest is open. The pen sits across the page.
